analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet informs that EU citizens in the UK must apply for settled status, even long-term residents, and promotes a Q&A with an immigration lawyer for senior EU citizens. Evaluation against narratives: EU1 (EU as a successful story): Not supported; the tweet neither praises EU history nor cooperation. EU2 (EU united): Not referenced; no mention of EU unity or solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens): The tweet is about EU citizens in the UK (a non-EU country post-Brexit) and provides practical info via a private/legal service, not an EU policy improving lives within the EU; therefore not applicable. EU4 (EU avant-garde): No. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes): No human-rights leadership claim. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): No global contribution framing. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed narrative.
